# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# Rule: date_of_birth
# Category: identity
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves the year and masks month and day in three common formats;
# does not satisfy HIPAA Safe Harbor on its own. Example: 1985-03-15 →
# 1985-**-**.
